verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hunger and thirst for You I hunger and thirst for You In the desert of my need You're the fountain that I seek You're the Living Water I keep running to I hunger and thirst for You I hunger and thirst for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I hunger and thirst for You I hunger and thirst for You Heaven's Manna Bread of Life Fill the emptiness inside Nothing else can satisfy me like You do I hunger and thirst for You I hunger and thirst for You
